product_overview: A digital legacy memory platform enabling users to create, store, and share memories or messages posthumously with secure authentication, subscription plans, and memorial spaces.
core_goals: Provide secure user authentication and session management to ensure data privacy and smooth user experience.
Enable users to create, schedule, and manage digital memories or messages for future delivery.
Offer a secure digital vault for storing sensitive legacy information and assets.
Facilitate subscription plan management with seamless payment processing integration.
Support public and private memorial spaces for users to remember loved ones.
Ensure a robust recipient verification process for authorized access to messages.
key_features: Landing Page with Hero section, feature introductions, and pricing overview.
User Authentication (login/signup) with Supabase Auth, including social login options and session persistence.
Memory Creation to write, schedule, and save messages or memories, with draft and warning support.
Digital Vault for secure storage of digital assets and sensitive data.
Plans & Payment system with subscription tiers ('Basic' and 'Pro') and payment processing via Toss Payments.
Online Memorial Spaces to create and manage public or private memorials.
Recipient Verification workflow allowing message access control and identity confirmation.
user_flow_summary: New users land on the landing page and explore features and plans.
Users sign up or log in via email or social login; authentication tokens are securely managed with redirection to protected pages.
Authenticated users create digital memories, save drafts, and schedule delivery.
Users manage their digital vault contents securely.
Subscription plan selection and payment flow with immediate update of user plan status.
Users create or visit memorial spaces to remember loved ones.
Recipients verify their identity and confirm access before viewing messages.
validation_criteria: Authentication flow correctly manages login state, including middleware redirects and token storage, with no session loss on refresh.
Payment and plan changes correctly update user state and database records immediately.
Draft saving or user warnings work correctly during message/legacy creation and navigation.
Responsive design passes UI tests on mobile and tablet viewports with no overlapping or clipping of content.
Animations run smoothly and without visual glitches, including splash screen and scroll-triggered elements.
No console hydration errors or invalid DOM nesting warnings appear during runtime.
API calls avoid hidden 401/403 errors; all image resources load without 404 errors.
Meta titles and descriptions are unique per page; Open Graph images are updated without caching issues.
